category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Bangladesh market (BSTI mandatory certification mark, BDS respirator standard adopting EN 149, labour-law occupational framework, importer obligations; medical masks via DGDA).

title.en: China-to-Bangladesh PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入孟加拉国（BSTI）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入孟加拉（BSTI）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Bangladesh market-access requirements: BSTI (Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution) mandatory certification mark, the BDS respirator standard that adopts EN 149, the labour-law occupational safety framework, in-country importer obligations, and the DGDA medical-device route for surgical/medical masks. Bangladesh lacks an EU-style horizontal regime (no RoHS, no battery regulation, no outdoor-noise directive).
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与孟加拉国市场准入要求对照，涵盖BSTI（孟加拉标准与测试机构）强制认证标志、采纳EN 149的BDS呼吸器标准、劳动法职业安全框架、在地进口商义务，以及外科/医用口罩经DGDA医疗器械路径。孟加拉国不设欧盟式的横向法规体系（无RoHS、无电池法规、无户外噪声指令）。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與孟加拉市場准入要求對照，涵蓋BSTI（孟加拉標準與測試機構）強制認證標誌、採納EN 149的BDS呼吸器標準、勞動法職業安全框架、在地進口商義務，以及外科/醫用口罩經DGDA醫療器械路徑。孟加拉不設歐盟式的橫向法規體系（無RoHS、無電池法規、無戶外噪聲指令）。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BSTI conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Bangladesh law, BSTI/BDS standards, the BSTI mandatory certification mark product list, labour-law occupational requirements, and DGDA medical-device classification with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BSTI合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行孟加拉国法律、BSTI/BDS标准、BSTI强制认证标志产品清单、劳动法职业要求及DGDA医疗器械分类。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BSTI合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行孟加拉法律、BSTI/BDS標準、BSTI強制認證標誌產品清單、勞動法職業要求及DGDA醫療器械分類。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案分析。

answer_first.en: Filtering respirators entering Bangladesh are governed by the Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution (BSTI) and the BDS national standard, which adopts EN 149 for filtering half masks. Where a product falls within BSTI's mandatory certification mark list, the BSTI certification mark and in-country importer obligations apply; occupational use is framed by the labour-law safety regime rather than a dedicated PPE regulation. Medical/surgical masks are routed through the Directorate General of Drug Administration (DGDA) as medical devices, not through the PPE/BSTI route. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports are built to a different test method than EN 149 and do not by themselves satisfy the BDS/EN 149 route. Bangladesh does not operate EU-style horizontal regimes (no RoHS, no battery regulation, no outdoor-noise directive).
answer_first.zh: 进入孟加拉国的过滤式呼吸器由孟加拉标准与测试机构（BSTI）及采纳EN 149过滤式半面罩标准的BDS国家标准管理。若产品列入BSTI强制认证标志清单，则适用BSTI认证标志及在地进口商义务；职业使用由劳动法安全制度框定，而非专门的PPE法规。医用/外科口罩经药品管理总局（DGDA）作为医疗器械处理，而非走PPE/BSTI路径。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告所依测试方法与EN 149不同，其本身不满足BDS/EN 149路径。孟加拉国不实行欧盟式横向法规（无RoHS、无电池法规、无户外噪声指令）。
answer_first.zht: 進入孟加拉的過濾式呼吸器由孟加拉標準與測試機構（BSTI）及採納EN 149過濾式半面罩標準的BDS國家標準管理。若產品列入BSTI強制認證標誌清單，則適用BSTI認證標誌及在地進口商義務；職業使用由勞動法安全制度框定，而非專門的PPE法規。醫用/外科口罩經藥品管理總局（DGDA）作為醫療器械處理，而非走PPE/BSTI路徑。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告所依測試方法與EN 149不同，其本身不滿足BDS/EN 149路徑。孟加拉不實行歐盟式橫向法規（無RoHS、無電池法規、無戶外噪聲指令）。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator or standards-body sources (BSTI, DGDA, Bangladesh labour authority, ILO/NATLEX, SAMR/NMPA) are preferred over secondary sources.
